title: War Plants Make Peace
summary: Dorothy Zinberg comments that the appearance of nuclear materials in Germany and Hungary dramatically points up the need to upgrade systems to control and account for nuclear materials in Russia.
body: Abstract Dorothy Zinberg comments that the appearance of nuclear materials in Germany and Hungary dramatically points up the need to upgrade systems to control and account for nuclear materials in Russia.
